allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:7474/api/auth/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"hr@bunyod.tj","password":"password"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK - token received'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:7474/api/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"email":"admin@holding.tj","password":"password"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('access_token',''\)[:50]\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress -notlike '127.*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*'} | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(e['id'], e.get\('documents','NO_FIELD'\)\) for e in data['data'][:2]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); matches=[e for e in data['data'] if e.get\('documents'\)]; print\('Found with docs:', [\(e['id'],e['documents']\) for e in matches]\)")
Bash(xargs -I{} docker exec hrms_frontend sh -c "cat {} | tr ',' '\\n' | grep -i 'snils\\|СНИЛС' | head -5")
